scripts.version:dev: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:prod && npm run sync:dev
scripts.version:rc: node scripts/version-tools.cjs rc && npm run sync:prod
scripts.version:prod: node scripts/version-tools.cjs prod && npm run sync:prod
scripts.package: npm run sync:prod && npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
scripts.package:dev: npm run sync:dev && npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.dev.json vss-extension.json
